 |  Entry Point  |
 +-------+-------+
         |
+[  Core Logic  ]-+
|        |        |
|        v        |
| +-------------+ |
| |  Process A  | |
| +------+------+ |
|        |        |
|        v        |
| +-------------+ |
| |  Process B  | |
| +------+------+ |
+--------|--------+
         |
         v
 +--------------+
 |  Exit Point  |
 +--------------+
